headline: SLB Stock Wavers After Earnings. How the Iran War Disrupted Its Recovery.
summary: While  SLB  claimed in January that its struggles in key regions were over, Friday’s earnings report signaled that the oilfield servcies provider is still facing headwinds.  CEO Olivier Le Peuch said SLB had “a challenging start to the year” becuase of the Iran war, with a pronounced impact on its well construction and reservoir performance divisions.  “SLB demobilized operations in a number of countries in response to customer actions to safeguard personnel and facilities,” Le Peuch said.

headline: SLB Stock Falls After Earnings. How the Iran War Disrupted Its Recovery.
summary: While  SLB  claimed in January that its struggles in key regions were over, Friday’s earnings report signaled headwinds continue for the oilfield services provider.  CEO Olivier Le Peuch conceded that SLB had “a challenging start to the year” as conflict in the Middle East affected its business, with a pronounced impact on its well construction and reservoir performance divisions.  “SLB demobilized operations in a number of countries in response to customer actions to safeguard personnel and facilities,” Le Peuch said.

headline: SLB Stock Tumbles on Earnings as CEO Cites ‘Challenging Start to the Year’
summary: While  SLB  claimed in January that its struggles in key regions were over, Friday’s earnings report signaled challenges continue for the oilfield services provider.  CEO Olivier Le Peuch conceded that SLB had “a challenging start to the year” as conflict in the Middle East affected its business, with a pronounced impact on its well construction and reservoir performance divisions.  “SLB demobilized operations in a number of countries in response to customer actions to safeguard personnel and facilities,” Le Peuch said.
